task.name: Stroop (RDoC)
reference_literature: Stroop (1935) Studies of interference in serial verbal reactions
MacLeod (1991) Half a century of research on the Stroop effect

stimuli.description: Attention check prompt asking for a specific key

response.response_key_js: (function(){var e=document.querySelector('#jspsych-attention-check-rdoc-stimulus');if(!e)return null;var t=e.textContent.toLowerCase();var m=t.match(/press the ([a-z]) key/);if(m)return m[1];if(t.includes('first letter of the english'))return 'a';if(t.includes('second letter of the english'))return 'b';if(t.includes('third letter of the english'))return 'c';if(t.includes('third to last'))return 'x';if(t.includes('second to last'))return 'y';if(t.includes('last letter'))return 'z';return null;})()

stimuli.description: Color word displayed in matching ink color

response.response_key_js: (function(){var e=document.querySelector('.stroop-stim');if(!e)return null;var c=(e.style&&e.style.color)?e.style.color:'';if(!c){var style=e.getAttribute('style')||'';var m=style.match(/color\s*:\s*([^;]+)/i);c=m?m[1]:'';}c=c.replace(/\s+/g,'').toLowerCase();var nameMap={'#ff7070':'red','#7070ff':'blue','#70ff70':'green','rgb(255,112,112)':'red','rgb(112,112,255)':'blue','rgb(112,255,112)':'green'};var colorName=nameMap[c];if(!colorName)return null;var kmap=window.possibleResponses;if(!kmap||typeof getColorByKey!=='function')return null;for(var i=0;i<kmap.length;i++){var k=kmap[i][1];var cb=getColorByKey(k);if(cb&&cb.name===colorName)return k;}return null;})()

stimuli.description: Color word displayed in non-matching ink color

detection.selector: (function(){var e=document.querySelector('.stroop-stim');if(!e)return false;var c=(e.style&&e.style.color)?e.style.color:'';if(!c){var style=e.getAttribute('style')||'';var m=style.match(/color\s*:\s*([^;]+)/i);c=m?m[1]:'';}c=c.replace(/\s+/g,'').toLowerCase();var w=e.textContent.trim().toLowerCase();var hexMap={'red':'#ff7070','blue':'#7070ff','green':'#70ff70'};var rgbMap={'red':'rgb(255,112,112)','blue':'rgb(112,112,255)','green':'rgb(112,255,112)'};if(!hexMap[w])return false;var wordColor=hexMap[w];var wordRgb=rgbMap[w];return (c!==wordColor)&&(c!==wordRgb)&&(c==='#ff7070'||c==='#7070ff'||c==='#70ff70'||c==='rgb(255,112,112)'||c==='rgb(112,112,255)'||c==='rgb(112,255,112)');})()

response.response_key_js: (function(){var e=document.querySelector('.stroop-stim');if(!e)return null;var c=(e.style&&e.style.color)?e.style.color:'';if(!c){var style=e.getAttribute('style')||'';var m=style.match(/color\s*:\s*([^;]+)/i);c=m?m[1]:'';}c=c.replace(/\s+/g,'').toLowerCase();var nameMap={'#ff7070':'red','#7070ff':'blue','#70ff70':'green','rgb(255,112,112)':'red','rgb(112,112,255)':'blue','rgb(112,255,112)':'green'};var colorName=nameMap[c];if(!colorName)return null;var kmap=window.possibleResponses;if(!kmap||typeof getColorByKey!=='function')return null;for(var i=0;i<kmap.length;i++){var k=kmap[i][1];var cb=getColorByKey(k);if(cb&&cb.name===colorName)return k;}return null;})()

autocorrelation.rationale: Modest lag-1 autocorrelation in RT series is well-documented (Gilden 2001; Wagenmakers et al. 2004).

fatigue_drift.rationale: Mild time-on-task slowing across ~120 test trials (Ackerman 2011).

post_error_slowing.rationale: Post-error slowing is robust in speeded choice tasks (Rabbitt 1966; Danielmeier & Ullsperger 2011).

condition_repetition.rationale: Congruency sequence (Gratton) effects: smaller Stroop interference after incongruent trials (Gratton et al. 1992; Egner 2007).

pink_noise.rationale: 1/f structure in RT series (Gilden 2001; Van Orden et al. 2003).

post_interrupt_slowing.rationale: No interrupt trials in Stroop task.

between_subject_jitter.rationale: Between-subject variability in baseline RT is substantial (~60-100ms SD); Stroop effect magnitude varies ~20ms SD across subjects.

pilot.rationale: Practice block has 4 trials (2 congruent, 2 incongruent). Pilot needs to run past practice and into test block (which has 20 congruent + 20 incongruent shuffled) to reliably see both conditions, since practice may repeat if accuracy threshold not met.

attention_check.response_js: (function(){var e=document.querySelector('#jspsych-attention-check-rdoc-stimulus');if(!e)return null;var t=e.textContent.toLowerCase();var m=t.match(/press the ([a-z]) key/);if(m)return m[1];if(t.includes('first letter of the english'))return 'a';if(t.includes('second letter of the english'))return 'b';if(t.includes('third letter of the english'))return 'c';if(t.includes('third to last'))return 'x';if(t.includes('second to last'))return 'y';if(t.includes('last letter'))return 'z';return null;})()
